title: Ordinary Portland Cement - Specification
scope: This standard specifies requirements for Ordinary Portland Cement (OPC) grades 33, 43, and 53 used in general construction, including civil engineering structures, buildings, roads, and bridges.
text_for_embedding: Standard Number: IS 269:2015 | Title: Ordinary Portland Cement - Specification | Category: Cement | Scope: This standard specifies requirements for Ordinary Portland Cement (OPC) grades 33, 43, and 53 used in general construction, including civil engineering structures, buildings, roads, and bridges. | Keywords: OPC, ordinary portland cement, cement grade 33, cement grade 43, cement grade 53, construction cement, binding material, clinker, gypsum, concrete mix | Applicable Products: general purpose cement, construction cement, OPC cement, portland cement, building cement

title: Portland Slag Cement - Specification
scope: Covers Portland slag cement produced by intergrinding Portland cement clinker and granulated blast furnace slag or by blending Portland cement with fine granulated blast furnace slag. Used in hydraulic structures, marine constructions and mass concrete works.
text_for_embedding: Standard Number: IS 455:2015 | Title: Portland Slag Cement - Specification | Category: Cement | Scope: Covers Portland slag cement produced by intergrinding Portland cement clinker and granulated blast furnace slag or by blending Portland cement with fine granulated blast furnace slag. Used in hydraulic structures, marine constructions and mass concrete works. | Keywords: PSC, portland slag cement, blast furnace slag, hydraulic structures, marine construction, mass concrete, slag cement, low heat cement | Applicable Products: portland slag cement, PSC cement, slag cement, hydraulic cement, marine cement, dam construction cement

title: Portland Pozzolana Cement - Specification Part 1: Fly Ash Based
scope: Specifies requirements for Portland Pozzolana Cement (PPC) produced by intimate mixing of Portland cement clinker with pozzolanic materials (fly ash). Used in plastering, masonry, and general construction where medium strength is sufficient.

title: 43 Grade Ordinary Portland Cement - Specification
scope: Specifies requirements for 43 grade Ordinary Portland Cement used in general civil engineering construction where high early strength is not critical. Suitable for RCC, plastering, and masonry work.

title: 53 Grade Ordinary Portland Cement - Specification
scope: Specifies requirements for 53 grade OPC, which achieves higher strength faster. Ideal for precast concrete, prestressed concrete, high-rise buildings, and rapid construction where early strength gain is essential.
